channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This slick tool monitors any web page for updates
item.description: Email newsletters are great. When there’s an update, it comes straight to your inbox. You don’t have to check a web page over and over again. But many websites don’t offer email updates.
item.dc:creator: Chris Hoffman, Fast Company

item.title: The iPhone 17 Air could be first in line for this cutting-edge display technology
item.description: The iPhone 17 rumors are certainly up and running now – and the latest to reach us is around displays.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: 'Fargo' creator: 'We've got a fight on our hands'
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google wants to make it easier for you to trade-in your old Android and save money
item.description: Future versions of Android might let you skip the standard setup process if you just want to test the phone.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Parallels debuts AI virtual machine platform that bundles 14 tools including small language models — and promises faster performance on Windows and Linux
item.description: Parallels Desktop 20 introduces advanced AI features, including a secure AI-ready virtual machine. A new Enterprise Edition offers management tools and security updates, while compatibility with macOS Sequoia and Windows 11 ensures flexibility.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Elon Musk will attend Trump’s Pennsylvania rally at site of first assassination attempt
item.description: Elon Musk is set to attend Donald Trump’s campaign rally in Butler, Pennsylvania, on Saturday, marking an even deeper show of the billionaire’s support for the former president and his shift to the right.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: 10 tech tips and tricks everyone should know
item.description: There are a handful of ways you can make your tech experience less annoying, including through fixing autocorrect, turning off certain notifications and by creating folders on your iPhone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Buttigieg dismisses Musk's Helene federal response claims
item.description: Department of Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg called out tech giant Elon Musk on Friday for making false claims about the federal government blocking flights with deliveries for Hurricane Helene victims.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: What to stream: Coldplay, an unhinged Charlie Puth, 'Salem’s Lot,' Sarah Paulson and NHL 25
item.description: Coldplay's 10th studio album and the American Music Awards celebrating their 50th anniversary are some of the new television, films, music and games headed to a device near you.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Civilization 7 makers work with Shawnee to bring sincere representation of the tribe to the game
item.description: MIAMI, Okla. (AP) — Shawnee Tribe Chief Ben Barnes grew up playing video games, including “probably hundreds of hours” colonizing a distant planet in the 1999 title Sid Meier's Alpha Centauri.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM LEE BREWER and MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Scammers are flooding Trump’s new crypto exchange
item.description: Back in September, Donald Trump announced his new crypto exchange, World Liberty Financial (WLFI). Now, registered investors can officially sign up for the whitelist—assuming they can avoid the scammers.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Open AI is testing a new interface for ChatGPT — ‘Canvas’
item.description: Open AI has unveiled Canvas, a new ChatGPT interface specifically crafted for developers that is now available in beta. Canvas has been developed using GPT-4o and makes it possible, among other things, to use a separate window for code.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: De la ‘sala de máquinas’ a la junta directiva: el nuevo rol del CIO, a debate en el CIO Summit 2024
item.description: Los debates marcaron, una vez más, gran parte de la agenda de la última edición de CIO Summit 2024, celebrado en Madrid los pasados 25 y 26 de septiembre.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Why airlines are turning to Starlink for in-flight Wi-Fi
item.description: Last week, Air France was the latest major airline to announce it will be moving its in-flight Wi-Fi to the Starlink network, offering it for free to members of its frequent flier program.
item.dc:creator: Jack Kuhr, Fast Company

item.title: Tener prisa por alcanzar el ROI de la IA puede salir caro
item.description: Muchas organizaciones han luchado por encontrar el retorno de la inversión (ROI) después de lanzar proyectos de inteligencia artificial (IA), pero existe el peligro de exigir demasiado, demasiado pronto, según la firma de investigación y asesoramiento de TI Forrester.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: OMB gives agencies new considerations when buying AI
item.description: The Office of Management and Budget told agencies in a new memo to proactively manage AI risks, promote a competitive market and manage business processes. The post OMB gives agencies new considerations when buying AI first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: The US and Microsoft disrupt a Russian hacking group targeting American officials and nonprofits
item.description: U.S. authorities and Microsoft say hackers linked to Russian intelligence targeted dozens of former military and intelligence officials, journalists and civil society groups with a sophisticated campaign designed to steal information.
item.dc:creator: David Klepper, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: OpenAI updates API with model distillation, prompt caching abilities
item.description: In what can only be seen as OpenAI’s efforts to catch up with rivals, the ChatGPT-maker released several updates to its API to help ease the development of generative AI-based applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google, it’s time to kill CAPTCHAS
item.description: Are you a robot? Google really, really wants to know. The answer to this question is demanded of web users 200 million times a day via CAPTCHAs — “Completely Automated Public Turing test to tell Computers and Humans Apart,” a system owned and operated by Google.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft cheat sheets: Dive into Windows and Office apps
item.description: Need to get up to speed on the latest features in Excel? Wrestling with an old version of Word? Finding your way around Windows 11 or looking to get more out of Windows 10? Computerworld’s cheat sheets are easy-to-use guides to help you navigate Microsoft’s core productivity software.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Apple accused of violating labor laws, again
item.description: Apple has been accused of violating union rights, according to a complaint filed by the US National Labor Relations Board (NLRB) .
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: ChatGPT maker OpenAI raises $6.6 billion in fresh funding as it moves away from its nonprofit roots
item.description: OpenAI says it has raised $6.6 billion in venture capital investments as part of a broader shift by the ChatGPT maker away from its nonprofit roots.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: IBM opens first quantum computing center in Europe
item.description: IBM unveiled its first IBM Quantum Data Center outside the United States – and its second ever – in Ehningen, Germany.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Beware of fraudsters posing as government officials trying to steal your cash
item.description: CISA warns of scammers impersonating its officials. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson urges people to be alert and verify contacts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tesla posts first quarterly increase in deliveries, but shares slump with investors hoping for more
item.description: Low interest financing, sweet lease deals, price cuts and free charging boosted Tesla’s global deliveries in the third quarter, the first increase this year for the electric vehicle maker.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Australia's online dating industry adopts code of conduct to keep users safer
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — A code of conduct will be enforced on the online dating industry to better protect Australian users after research found that three-in-four people suffer some form of sexual violence through the platforms, Australia’s government said on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: After Change Healthcare, HHS building cyber incident response team
item.description: In the wake of the Change Healthcare ransomware attack, HHS has been expanding its "one-stop shop" for working with the healthcare sector on cyber issues. The post After Change Healthcare, HHS building cyber incident response team first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Details from New Mexico's lawsuit against Snap show site failed to act on reports of sextortion
item.description: Snapchat failed to act on “rampant” reports of child grooming, sextortion and other dangers to minors on its platform, according to a newly unredacted complaint against the company filed by New Mexico's attorney general. Attorney General Raúl Torrez filed the original complaint on Sept.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: PyTorch library makes models faster and smaller
item.description: The PyTorch Foundation, makers of the PyTorch machine learning framework, has launched torchao, a PyTorch native library that makes models faster and smaller by leveraging low-bit dtypes, sparsity, and quantization.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia and IBM Cloud Partner on AI Implementations with Expanded Access to GPUs
item.description: IBM offers expanded access to Nvidia GPUs on IBM Cloud, helping enterprise customers advance their AI implementations including large language model training.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: New Jersey offshore wind farm clears big federal hurdle amid environmental concerns
item.description: SEA GIRT, N.J. (AP) — The federal government gave a key approval Tuesday to an offshore wind farm in New Jersey, even as residents in the town where its power cable would come ashore worry it could go through underground toxic waste that's still being cleaned up. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: WAYNE PARRY, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Scammers’ sneaky new tactic preying on people who’ve lost their iPhone
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals how to protect yourself with eight steps if your iPhone is lost or stolen.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The battle cry of 2025: Do cloud local!
item.description: Microclouds can have many names and offer many features. They can be hosted by a regional cloud provider or specialize in a specific use case, such as the rise of GPU cloud providers focusing on the exploding AI space.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Breaking through AI data bottlenecks
item.description: As AI models become increasingly commoditized, the data required to train and fine-tune them has never been more critical.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Arkansas sues YouTube over claims that the site is fueling a mental health crisis
item.description: LITTLE ROCK, Ark. (AP) — Arkansas sued YouTube and parent company Alphabet on Monday, saying the video-sharing platform is made deliberately addictive and fueling a mental health crisis among youth in the state.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DeMILLO, Associated Press, KRON4
